message:
feat(fwc): add connector-filtered catalog loading for faster single-connector commands

- Add DiscoveryCatalog::load_for_connector_filter() that scopes
  manifest scanning to a single connector slug when the selector is a
  simple slug, avoiding the cost of loading all connector manifests
  for targeted commands like mesh-availability
- Wire it into mesh_availability_dispatch via load_for_connector_filter
- Add is_simple_connector_slug() validator and 2 tests verifying
  filtered vs fallback loading behavior
- nostr: hoist MAX_QUERY_LIMIT const to function scope (style-only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
